title: Canadian Romance Quiche
description: A classic quiche filled with the flavors of Canada, perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 sheet of frozen puff pastry, thawed

instructions: Roll out the puff pastry and place it in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, cheddar cheese, diced ham, diced onion, and thyme.
Pour the egg mixture into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
